style.global: Classic hand-drawn Disney animation style inspired by the Golden Age (Snow White, Bambi). Warm organic flowing lines with natural variation in line weight. Large soulful expressive eyes. Painterly brushstrokes visible in fur, wings, and flowers. Soft rounded character proportions. Vintage animation cel warmth with dramatic lighting for tense scenes. Mixed setting — sunny wildflower meadow for peaceful scenes, dramatic shadows and storm light for conflict scenes. Warm honey tones contrasted with cold danger tones. Emotionally honest and visually powerful.

queen-aurelia.name: Queen Aurelia
queen-aurelia.description: Majestic honey bee queen, the largest bee in the hive, with an elongated golden abdomen, regal bearing, golden crown-like pattern on her thorax
uniqueFeatures: LARGEST bee character — noticeably bigger than all workers, elongated body
ELONGATED GOLDEN ABDOMEN — much longer than worker bees, tapered and elegant
GOLDEN CROWN-LIKE PATTERN on thorax — distinctive marking that looks like a tiny crown
Moves SLOWLY and DELIBERATELY — never rushed, always regal
Warmer, deeper gold coloring than standard yellow-black workers
Workers always clustered around her, attending and feeding
queen-aurelia.personality: Regal and cold — carries the weight of her crown and the secret of how she earned it
queen-aurelia.notLike: NOT small like workers, NOT black-and-yellow striped like Buzz, NOT fluffy like Petal

buzz.name: Buzz
buzz.description: Hardworking worker bee with bright yellow-and-black stripes, fuzzy body always covered in pollen, one wing with a tiny notch, shows increasing wear as story progresses
uniqueFeatures: Standard worker size — much smaller than Queen Aurelia
BRIGHT YELLOW-AND-BLACK stripes — classic bee coloring, vivid and cheerful
TINY NOTCH in one wing — distinctive identifying mark, but flies perfectly
FUZZY body always DUSTED WITH POLLEN — looks like she rolled in gold dust
Wings become visibly FRAYED and WORN as story progresses — showing her short lifespan
Expression shifts from cheerful to determined to weary but unwavering
buzz.personality: Hardworking and uncomplaining — works until her body gives out, never questions her duty
buzz.notLike: NOT large like Queen Aurelia, NOT extra fluffy like Petal, NOT dark like Spike

petal.name: Petal
petal.description: Young bee on her first foraging flights, slightly smaller than other workers, lighter coloring, extra fluffy fuzz, wide-eyed wonder that matures into quiet resolve
uniqueFeatures: SLIGHTLY SMALLER than other worker bees — young and delicate
LIGHTER COLORING — paler yellow, less intense stripes than Buzz
EXTRA FLUFFY — has not worn down her fuzz yet, looks like a tiny pompom
WIDE EYES — bigger, rounder eyes than other bees, full of wonder
Lighter, more translucent wings — newer and more delicate
Transforms from nervous newcomer to determined veteran across the story
petal.personality: Starts nervous and wide-eyed, ends resolute — the witness who sees both beauty and cost
petal.notLike: NOT as boldly striped as Buzz, NOT large like Queen Aurelia, NOT dark like Spike

spike.name: Spike
spike.description: Guard bee, slightly larger worker with darker coloring, stationed at the hive entrance, mandibles always ready, willing to make the ultimate sacrifice
uniqueFeatures: SLIGHTLY LARGER than standard workers — bulkier, more muscular build
DARKER COLORING — deeper brown-black with darker yellow, more muted stripes
Always STANDING ALERT with MANDIBLES READY — jaws slightly open
Stockier build — wider thorax and legs than other workers
Positioned at hive entrance — always on guard duty
Intense, watchful eyes scanning everything — the face of sacrifice
spike.personality: Protective and selfless — knows his sting will kill him, stands ready anyway
spike.notLike: NOT cheerful and bouncy like Buzz, NOT fluffy like Petal, NOT regal like Queen Aurelia

alt.en: A beehive at dusk with dramatic storm clouds gathering, bees flying in urgent formation, the warm golden glow of the hive interior contrasting with the dark threatening sky, a lone hornet silhouette on the horizon
alt.es: Una colmena al anochecer con dramaticas nubes de tormenta acumulandose, abejas volando en formacion urgente, el calido brillo dorado del interior de la colmena contrastando con el cielo oscuro amenazante, la silueta de un avispón en el horizonte
alt.ru: Улей в сумерках с надвигающимися грозовыми тучами, пчёлы летят в срочном строю, тёплое золотистое свечение улья контрастирует с тёмным угрожающим небом, одинокий силуэт шершня на горизонте

alt.en: Beehive at dusk with storm clouds, bees rushing home, dark hornet shapes in the distance, ominous atmosphere
alt.es: Colmena al anochecer con nubes de tormenta, abejas apresurandose a casa, formas oscuras de avispones a lo lejos, atmosfera ominosa
alt.ru: Улей в сумерках с грозовыми тучами, пчёлы спешат домой, тёмные силуэты шершней вдали, зловещая атмосфера

alt.en: Two massive giant hornets hovering menacingly near the hive entrance, dwarfing a lone guard bee, dramatic tense lighting
alt.es: Dos avispones gigantes masivos suspendidos amenazadoramente cerca de la entrada de la colmena, empequeñeciendo a una abeja guardia solitaria
alt.ru: Два огромных шершня угрожающе зависли у входа в улей, крошечная пчела-охранник перед ними, напряжённое драматичное освещение

alt.en: Guard bee releasing alarm pheromone as a golden mist, chain reaction of alert spreading through the colony, urgent dramatic atmosphere
alt.es: Abeja guardia liberando feromona de alarma como una niebla dorada, reaccion en cadena de alerta esparciendose por la colonia
alt.ru: Пчела-охранник выпускает феромон тревоги в виде золотистого тумана, цепная реакция тревоги распространяется по колонии

alt.en: Hundreds of bees forming a vibrating heat ball around a trapped giant hornet, visible heat waves, some bees collapsing from the effort
alt.es: Cientos de abejas formando una bola de calor vibrante alrededor de un avispón atrapado, ondas de calor visibles, algunas abejas colapsando por el esfuerzo
alt.ru: Сотни пчёл формируют вибрирующий тепловой шар вокруг пойманного шершня, видимые тепловые волны, некоторые пчёлы падают от усилия

alt.en: Dramatic close-up of a bee with barbed stinger torn from its abdomen after stinging a hornet, showing the ultimate sacrifice
alt.es: Dramatico primer plano de una abeja con aguijon arrancado de su abdomen tras picar a un avispón, mostrando el sacrificio definitivo
alt.ru: Драматичный крупный план пчелы с вырванным зазубренным жалом из брюшка после того, как ужалила шершня, высшая жертва

alt.en: Progression of a worker bee's life from larva to worn-out forager with frayed wings, the bittersweet passage of six short weeks
alt.es: Progresion de la vida de una obrera desde larva hasta recolectora desgastada con alas deshilachadas, el agridulce paso de seis cortas semanas
alt.ru: Жизненный путь рабочей пчелы от личинки до изношенной собирательницы с истрёпанными крыльями, горько-сладкое течение шести коротких недель

alt.en: Queen bee approaching sealed rival queen cells in a dark royal chamber, one cell already torn open, cold determined expression
alt.es: Abeja reina acercandose a celdas reales selladas de rivales en una oscura camara real, una celda ya abierta, expresion fria y decidida
alt.ru: Королева пчёл приближается к запечатанным маточным ячейкам соперниц в тёмной королевской палате, одна ячейка уже вскрыта, холодное решительное выражение

alt.en: Massive swarm of bees on a branch with scouts performing competing waggle dances, a living democratic vote in golden light
alt.es: Enjambre masivo de abejas en una rama con exploradoras realizando danzas competitivas, un voto democratico viviente en luz dorada
alt.ru: Огромный рой пчёл на ветке, разведчицы исполняют конкурирующие танцы, живое демократическое голосование в золотистом свете

alt.en: Devastated beehive torn apart, broken honeycomb and dead bees, honey dripping to waste, a few survivors above the ruins, cold somber light
alt.es: Colmena devastada destrozada, panal roto y abejas muertas, miel goteando desperdiciada, unos pocos sobrevivientes sobre las ruinas, luz fria y sombria
alt.ru: Разрушенный улей, сломанные соты и погибшие пчёлы, мёд стекает впустую, несколько выживших над руинами, холодный мрачный свет

alt.en: Jar of golden honey on a windowsill surrounded by translucent ghostly images of bees who gave their lives, bittersweet and beautiful
alt.es: Frasco de miel dorada en un alfeizar rodeado de imagenes translucidas fantasmales de abejas que dieron sus vidas, agridulce y hermoso
alt.ru: Банка золотистого мёда на подоконнике, окружённая полупрозрачными образами пчёл, отдавших свои жизни, горько-сладкое и прекрасное

alt.en: Beehive at golden sunrise after battle, fallen defenders at entrance, new bees emerging inside, experienced forager heading to flowers, life continuing
alt.es: Colmena al amanecer dorado despues de la batalla, defensores caidos en la entrada, nuevas abejas emergiendo adentro, recolectora experimentada dirigiendose a las flores
alt.ru: Улей на золотистом рассвете после битвы, павшие защитники у входа, новые пчёлы рождаются внутри, опытная собирательница летит к цветам, жизнь продолжается
